zh.lifeSummary: 當Avice de Lancaster於1088年出生在法國諾門迪曼其拉 馬時，她的父親Roger le Poitevin34歲，母親Almodis de la Marche26歲。她和William 'the Junior' de Peverell II至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1149年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆享年61歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Avice de Lancaster于1088年出生在法国諾門迪曼其拉 馬时，她的父亲Roger le Poitevin34岁，母亲Almodis de la Marche26岁。她和William 'the Junior' de Peverell II至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1149年在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆享年61岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lancaster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lancaster in northwestern England, which is recorded as Loncastre in 1086. The place takes its name from the river Lune + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’). The river name is probably British, perhaps related to Gaelic slán ‘healthy’, ‘salubrious’.

nameMeanings.name: Avice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French form of the ancient Germanic name Aveza, derived from a short form of one or more compound names containing the first element av (as in Ava ; the meaning is uncertain). The correspondence in form to the Latin word avis ‘bird’ is coincidental.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Avice de Lancaster was born in 1088, in La Marche, Manche, Normandy, France, her father, Roger le Poitevin, was 34 and her mother, Almodis de la Marche, was 26. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with William 'the Junior' de Peverell II. She died in 1149, in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Avice de Lancaster est née en 1088, à La Marche, Manche, Normandie, France, son père, Roger le Poitevin, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Almodis de la Marche, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec William 'the Junior' de Peverell II. Elle est décédée en 1149, à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Avice de Lancaster 1088 in La Marche, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger le Poitevin 34 und ihre Mutter Almodis de la Marche 26. Sie hatte mit William 'the Junior' de Peverell II mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1149 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Avice de Lancaster è nata il nel 1088 nel La Marche, Manche, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Roger le Poitevin, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Almodis de la Marche, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con William 'the Junior' de Peverell II. Morì nel 1149, nel Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Avice de Lancasterが1088年にフランスノーマンディマンチェラ マルチェで生まれた時，父Roger le Poitevinは34歳，母Almodis de la Marcheは26歳であった。彼女はWilliam 'the Junior' de Peverell IIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1149年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムで61歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Avice de Lancaster(이)가 1088년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 라 마체에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger le Poitevin(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Almodis de la Marche(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 William 'the Junior' de Peverell II(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1149년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

mn.Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, Un: Nottingham, Snotengaham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Avice de Lancaster nasceu em 1088, em La Marche, Manche, Normandie, França, seu pai, Roger le Poitevin, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Almodis de la Marche, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com William 'the Junior' de Peverell II. Ela faleceu em 1149, em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avice de Lancaster родилась в 1088 г. в местности ла марч, манч, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Roger le Poitevin было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Almodis de la Marche, 26. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от William 'the Junior' de Peverell II. Она умерла в 1149 г. в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Avice de Lancaster nació en 1088, en La Marche, Manche, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Roger le Poitevin, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Almodis de la Marche, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con William 'the Junior' de Peverell II. Murió en 1149, en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
